issues.detail: The skill does not handle error scenarios or edge cases.
The skill is vendor-locked to Cloudflare Workers AI and cannot run on other platforms.

scenarios.name: streaming-chat-endpoint
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies the rubric, while Response B uses a different API and binding, missing the required AI.run call.

scenarios.name: rag-pipeline-worker
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response B uses incorrect bindings, model identifiers, and incomplete logic.
